title: Aeroxon Window fly traps, fruit, pack of 4.
features: Glue trap for catching flies and fruit flies
description: Non-toxic and odourless glue trap with large colour-printed adhesive surface for catching flies and fruit flies in all interiors. The Aeroxon window fly trap in the shape of a glued plastic strip printed with coloured fruits catches flies in all interiors. The trap uses the natural behaviour of the flies attracted to heat and light sources and therefore like to stay on the window. The flies attracted in this way are reliably held in place by the glue surface of the trap. Also catches fruit flies when the trap is placed near the source of infestation (e.g. fruit bowl). The window fly trap is ideal for use in living rooms, holiday homes, as well as in the workplace and in the catering industry.
